data.title: Lerøy Seafood issued a NOK 500M green bond with 4-year maturity, 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% p.a., significantly oversubscribed
data.description: On September 22, 2025, Lerøy Seafood Group ASA, which holds a BBB+ (Stable) rating from Nordic Credit Rating, made a public statement regarding stock exchange matters. The company has successfully issued a green bond totaling NOK 500 million. This bond has a maturity period of 4 years and offers a coupon rate of 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% per annum. It is worth noting that the bond issuance received an overwhelming response from investors, being significantly oversubscribed.

data.title: Bombardier closes offering of US$250 million Senior Notes due 2033, increasing total to US$750 million.
data.description: Bombardier Inc. has recently finalized a transaction by closing its offering of US$250 million aggregate principal amount of Senior Notes due 2033, known as the "Additional Notes." These Additional Notes are an extension of the existing US$500 million aggregate principal amount of Bombardier’s 6.750% Senior Notes due 2033, which were initially issued on May 29, 2025, combining to form a single series. The coupon rate for the Additional Notes is set at 6.750% per year, with a maturity date of June 15, 2033. They were priced at 103.500% plus accrued interest from May 29, 2025, until the issue date of the Additional Notes.

data.title: Kalshi partners with Pro Padel League for City's Cup Final in NYC, offering fans chance to wager on matches from October 16–19, 2025.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Kalshi, the inaugural U.S. federally regulated prediction market, disclosed a significant collaboration with the Pro Padel League (PPL) for its City’s Cup Final event. This event is scheduled to be held at the renowned Hammerstein Ballroom in New York City spanning from October 16 to 19, 2025. The partnership entails Kalshi providing fans with the chance to place bets on the results of every match during the City’s Cup Final. By offering this unique opportunity, Kalshi aims to enhance fan involvement and interaction with the tournament.

data.title: Refreshco reprices EUR and USD Term Loan B facilities. Successful completion with significant savings.
data.description: In the latest developments, it has been reported that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing analysts' expectations. The manufacturing industry saw a particularly notable increase in hiring, with 50,000 new jobs created. Additionally, average hourly earnings have increased by 3.2% compared to last year, indicating positive growth in wages. These statistics suggest a strong and improving labor market, providing optimism for continued economic growth in the near future.

data.title: DYWIDAG issues €90M bond to replace term loans and support global expansion.
data.description: The funds raised will be used to replace current term loans and support expansion into various international markets. This move will equip the company to further establish its presence across the globe.

data.title: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. sells €75 million of 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 in private offering.
data.description: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. announced that its subsidiary, Kronos International, Inc., will sell €75 million of additional 9.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 through a private placement. This is in addition to the existing €351,174,000 of similar notes issued in 2024. The terms of the new Notes will be the same as the Existing Notes, with the only difference being the date of issuance and issue price. The Notes will be identified by different ISIN and Common Code numbers until 40 days post issue date, after which they will align with the Existing Notes.

data.title: Avenue Living achieves $8.5B in AUM, records $1.2B acquisitions, $600M annual revenue, and $250M unsecured notes offering.
data.description: Avenue Living, a leading private real estate investment firm in North America, has had a successful year in 2025. The firm boasts over 1,000 employees across seven provinces and 20 states, managing $8.5 billion in assets and completing $1.2 billion in acquisitions. With almost $600 million in annual recurring revenue, Avenue Living's consistent operations-first mentality has driven its growth. Achieving investment-grade debt ratings and oversubscribed global expansion offerings, the firm's disciplined growth strategy underpins its success. Specializing in workforce housing, self-storage, and farmland, Avenue Living's focus on balanced markets has led to a strong performance throughout the year.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems remarkets $37.5M in NY Environmental Facilities Corp Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds with 4.250% interest by Sept 2, 2025.
data.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. has priced the remarketing of $37.5 million aggregate principal amount of New York State Environmental Facilities Corporation Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds. Originally issued at $40 million, these bonds have a final maturity date of September 1, 2050. Casella will redeem $2.5 million of the Bonds on September 2, 2025, with the remaining $37.5 million to be remarketed on the same date. The new interest rate for the remarketed bonds is set at 4.250% per annum, effective from September 2, 2025, to September 2, 2030. The transaction is expected to be completed on September 2, 2025.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates MLNK, ODP, SMLR for potential violations, Oct 2025.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, an investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, announced its investigation into several companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is MeridianLink, Inc. (NYSE: MLNK), which is being investigated concerning its sale. This investigation is significant as it involves shareholder interests and potential legal infractions, indicating possible missteps in the business dealings of the said company. The outcome of this investigation could have implications for both the company and its shareholders, impacting the firm's standing in the market and potentially leading to legal repercussions if any wrongful practices are discovered. Investors and stakeholders are advised to closely monitor developments related to this investigation to make informed decisions concerning their investments or involvement with these companies.

data.title: Long John Silver's introduces new logo and menu to highlight chicken alongside seafood offerings, aiming for a fresh brand image.
data.description: A well-known brand in Louisville, Kentucky, recently revealed a surprising change to its image. Long John Silver's, renowned for their hand-battered fish and golden shrimp, is expanding their menu offerings by introducing "CHICKEN + SEAFOOD." The brand unveiled a fresh logo to reflect this new direction on October 3, 2025. This move signifies a significant shift for the iconic brand and aims to attract a wider customer base with this innovative menu addition.

data.title: Niron Magnetics donates to Sartell Police Reserve, supporting local community. New facility: 190,000-square-foot.
data.description: Niron Magnetics based in Sartell, Minnesota, has pledged a donation to the Sartell Police Reserve Program as part of their ongoing dedication to the local community. This initiative aligns with the company's efforts as it sets up a new 190,000-square-foot manufacturing plant in the city. The Police Reserve Program, a volunteer group, offers crucial support to the Sartell Police Department during various activities like special events, parades, sports events, and youth programs. The donation underscores Niron Magnetics' commitment to civic engagement and local community welfare.
